# Blym

> Blym is an AI content studio for mum creators. It delivers a personalised daily filming brief — hook, caption, shot list and best post time — built for real life on TikTok and Instagram.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Blym does, how it works, pricing and reviews.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): The contract for using Blym.
- [Privacy Notice](/privacy): How Blym collects, uses and protects your data.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): 7-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.
